constraints.text: Food and refreshments are generally considered to be personal expenses that cannot be purchased using Federal funds.
The Commission must comply with Federal law pertaining to the provision of food or refreshments, or both, at meetings.
The NRC staff should dress respectfully as for any business meeting with elected officials or distinguished representatives of a government.
Prolonged eye contact may be inappropriate; the Tribe may not consider making or holding eye contact respectful behavior.
Inappropriate laughter may be considered a lack of respect or seriousness or belittling the subject matter.
